title: ZoomW (WAIZA)
description: The Enhanced ZoomWMod allows players to fine-tune their zoom settings in Minecraft, providing a more immersive and customizable experience. Easily adjust zoom speed, default zoom levels, and enjoy a smooth, responsive zoom functionality with this mod.
body:
# Overview The Enhanced WAIZA Mod (What Am I Zooming At?) provides Minecraft players with a fully customizable zooming experience, allowing for more precise control over how you view the world. Whether you need to zoom in for a closer look at distant landscapes, or quickly zoom out for a broader view, this mod offers a range of settings that can be fine-tuned to match your preferences. Perfect for adventurers, builders, and anyone who enjoys a more tailored visual experience in Minecraft.
# Dependencies From now on you will need 2 new dependencies to run this mod. - **Mod Menu**: This handles the config button. - **YACL**: This handles the configuration screen and is a very reliable and thrustworthy mod. You can find YACL [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) and Mod Menu [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu). # Mod Menu Integration Upon first launch, the mod will generate a configuration file inside Mod Menu. You can access it through the Menu of Mod Menu. Here’s what each setting controls: - **zoom_increment:** Determines how much the zoom level changes with each scroll or key press. (Default: 0.05) Description: A lower value allows for finer adjustments, while a higher value makes zooming faster but less precise. - **max_zoom:** Sets the maximum zoom level you can achieve. (Default: 0.83) Description: This limits how far in you can zoom. Useful to prevent excessive zooming that might distort the view. - **min_zoom:** Sets the minimum zoom level you can achieve. (Default: 0.03) Description: This controls how far out you can zoom, allowing for a wide-angle view of your surroundings. - **zoom_smoothing:** Controls the smoothness of the zoom transition. (Default: 0.05) Description: A lower value results in a quicker, more immediate zoom, while a higher value makes zooming feel more gradual. - **instant_zoom_increment:** Defines the increment for instant zoom adjustments. (Default: 0.1) Description: Use this setting for faster zoom changes when you need to quickly get closer or further away. - **default_zoom_level:** Sets the default zoom level that the mod reverts to when you release the zoom key. (Default: 0.23) Description: This is your “starting point” for zooming, ensuring a consistent and comfortable level of zoom when not actively zooming in or out.
# Installation 1. Install Minecraft Fabric Loader: _Ensure you have the Fabric Loader installed for your version of Minecraft._ 2. Download and Place the Mod: 3. Download the Enhanced waiza .jar file and place it in your .minecraft/mods folder. 4. Run Minecraft **The mod will automatically create the configuration file on first run. Tweak the settings to your liking through the in-game Mod Menu.**
# Languages supported WAIZA supports the following languages: - **English** - **Spanish** - **Italian** - **French** - **German** - More to come...
